title: Weaponworks
description: A Mod focusing on expanding melee combat with new weapon classes.
body:
# Atteeeention!
Apparently there is an issue with the CF app not downloading the ItemFig dependency for 1.20.1-1.20.4 fabric versions. If that happens, simply add it manually through "Add More Content" button. Sorry for the inconvenience, the issue is being looked into.

UPDATE: It is advised to update the mod to Weaponworks 1.4.1-1.20.1 Fabric version, together with ItemFig update to ItemFig 1.20.1-0.2.7 Fabric as some file juggling was done. The issue still perists, unfortunately.

## **Weaponworks adds 9 new weapon classes, each suited for a different style of combat.**


**Each weapon type comes in 6 tiers:**
- Wood
- Stone
- Iron
- Gold
- Diamond
- Netherite

**Available weapons:**

- Greatsword
 
- Katana
- Spear
- Halberd
- Scythe
- Rapier
- Hammer
- Mace
- Warglaive

![A picture showing all current reicpes in 1.4.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dd4d579681b6674d345b8db0400ebec7b1b790d.png)
---
The weapons are configurable since version 1.3.0 thanks to [Sortilege](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sortilege)
 powered configs. 
Parameters that can be configured at the moment are:

- Damage (damage of the weapon itself that is added on top of hand damage, which by default is 1).
- Attack speed.
- Durability.
- Fire resistance.
- Attack range (only with and via Better Combat).
